nodes.label: Logistics Planning and Strategy Session
nodes.description: Two business professionals at a desk with multiple laptops reviewing hand-drawn flowcharts and diagrams on paper. Pencils and pens on the table. Neutral, professional tone suggesting collaborative supply-chain planning or route optimisation. Represents Meridian 3PL's consultative, analytical approach to logistics management.
nodes.site_purpose: Represents strategic logistics planning and consultancy services offered to clients
